use_cases: Displaying global user locations or distribution metrics on a 3D world map
Creating interactive location-based landing page visuals for travel brands
Showing office locations or branch distribution for enterprise dashboards
Adding engaging interactive elements to analytics or marketing pages
Visualizing global event data or travel routes with emoji markers
ai_summary: An interactive 3D globe component that displays emoji stickers at geographic coordinates using the COBE WebGL library. The globe features smooth auto-rotation with configurable speed and supports drag-to-rotate interactions via pointer events. Users can customize markers with custom emojis and locations, making it ideal for visualizing global data, location metrics, or adding engaging interactive elements to landing pages and dashboards.
